title: Ukraine Reveals New Details on Russia's Stealthy S-71K Air-Launched Missile
summary: Ukraine's GUR released detailed information and a 3D model of Russia's S-71K Kovyor stealthy air-launched missile used in combat against Ukraine.
contents:
# Ukraine Reveals New Details on Russia's Stealthy S-71K Air-Launched Missile

## Overview
Ukraine's GUR released detailed information and a 3D model of Russia's S-71K Kovyor stealthy air-launched missile used in combat against Ukraine.

## Details
The S-71K, developed for the Su-57 Felon fighter, features a R500 turbojet engine, inertial navigation, three internal fuel tanks for up to 186-mile range, Mach 0.6 speed, and 27,000-foot altitude. It has remained in combat since late last year, posing challenges to Ukraine's air defenses amid shortages of Western systems. Tested on Su-57 at Zhukovsky flight center in April 2024, it could remain carried by other Russian jets for mass use. Developed by UAC to replace costlier cruise missiles due to production constraints.

## Location
Ukraine/Russia

## Source Context
Reporting referenced from coverage tracked by the @ELINTNews OSINT beat. The cited outlet provides additional context, attribution, and verification of the claims summarized above.

## Tags
S-71K missile, Su-57, Ukraine GUR, air-launched weapons, Russia Ukraine war, stealth missile, air defense
